name: The Deep-Space Comm Relay
description: Intercept a secured transmission by forcing the static-scrubber into diagnostic bypass.

flaws.name: Max Out Signal Amplifier
flaws.flavor_text: Crank the signal amplifier to its limit. This introduces immense static noise into the channel.

flaws.name: Overload Static Scrubber
flaws.flavor_text: Force the static-scrubber to process the noisy channel. It crashes under load and restarts in diagnostic bypass mode, leaking raw unencrypted packets.
